argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const tweetId = '{{ url }}'.match(/\/status\/(\d+)/)?.[1]; if (!tweetId) return { error: 'Invalid tweet URL' }; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const primary = document.querySelector('[data-testid="primaryColumn"]'); if (!primary) await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const article = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('article')).find(a => a.querySelector('a[href*="/status/' + tweetId + '"]')); if (!article) return { ok: false, message: 'Tweet article not found' }; const retweetBtn = article.querySelector('[data-testid="retweet"]'); if (retweetBtn) return { ok: true, message: 'Already not retweeted' }; const unretweetBtn = article.querySelector('[data-testid="unretweet"]'); if (!unretweetBtn) return { ok: false, message: 'Unretweet button not found' }; unretweetBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const confirmBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="unretweetConfirm"]'); if (confirmBtn) { confirmBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); } const verified = article.querySelector('[data-testid="retweet"]'); return { ok: !!verified, message: verified ? 'Unretweeted' : 'Unretweet confirmation not verified' }; }
async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ ok: false, message: intermediate.error }]; return [intermediate]; }
